FROZEN TO CRISPY: Cook frozen foods in just minutes for an extra-crispy finish. SPACE SAVER: Ninja’s latest air fryer design allows you to save even more space on your countertop without compromising capacity. EASY TO CLEAN: The basket and crisper plate are both nonstick for easy cleaning. WHAT’S INCLUDED: Air Fryer, 5-QT nonstick basket and crisper plate, chef-inspired 20 recipe book and cooking charts.
ai_analysis: 该产品主打多功能空气炸锅，强调其4-in-1功能，包括空气炸、烤制、再加热和脱水。产品以大容量和高效率为卖点，能够处理大量食材如4磅薯条或5磅鸡翅，并且使用超级加热空气技术，实现少油或无油的健康烹饪。文案还强调了产品的易清洁性、节省空间的设计以及附带的食谱书，这些都是针对追求健康、方便快捷和高效厨房生活的消费者。
